title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Restaurant Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Swiggy Restaurant Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
